title: Circular Evidence: A Detailed Investigation of the Flattened Swirled Crops Phenomenon

description.en: Pat Delgado and Colin Andrews's 1989 Bloomsbury work — the principal early book-length engagement with the British crop circle phenomenon and the foundational text of pre-confession crop circle research. Delgado, an electromechanical engineer, and Andrews, an electrical engineer, were the principal English-language documentarians of the substantial 1980s-phase formations. Their substantial photographic catalogue and substantial systematic case documentation shaped the discipline's early methodological framework. The work substantially predates the 1991 Bower-Chorley confession and operates substantively within the residual-anomaly research framework.
